sections.heading: Their words,not ours.
sections.text: Chapter I. ✦ REVIEWS Their words, not ours. Selections from Google and firsthand experience. We chose only honesty.

sections.heading: Google Rating
sections.text: 4.4 ★★★★★ GOOGLE RATING From 1,500+ Google reviews OPEN ON GOOGLE ↗

★★★★★ "They explained three options, then said the simplest one suited me best." No upsell, no pressure. Dr. Marina walked me through three filler approaches, then recommended the most conservative one. Six weeks later my husband noticed I 'looked rested' — that's the whole point. Patient · Khobar Apr 2026 ★★★★★ "My mother came with me, then she booked for herself." First visit was for me — Hydrafacial with Dr. Marina. By my third visit my mother had her own appointment with Dr. Doaa. We're now three patients from the same family. Patient · Al Khobar Mar 2026 ★★★★★ "Dr. Hassan rebuilt my smile around my face, not a template." I went to two clinics for veneer consultations — both showed me the same six-shape templates. Dr. Hassan Nazzal photographed my face and designed the veneers around my actual proportions. Different conversation. Patient · Khobar Feb 2026 ★★★★★ "I came for a consult, stayed for ten years." Started at Bright with Dr. Marina back in 2018. The same hands, the same standard, year after year. That kind of continuity is rare in this market. Patient · Al Khobar Jan 2026

The coordinator quietly mentioned Tabby and Tamara, both within the SAR 10K cap. Made everything possible. Female specialist, female nurse, female receptionist on the floor that day. No drama, no extra fee. Patient · Khobar Feb 2026 Not sure which department fits?
